<div class="section-outer section-green">
 <div class="section-header">
  <span class="section-header-text">In this section, we will discuss the handy tools that can speed up your agentic engineering.</span>
 </div>
 <div class="section-grid section-grid-2">
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="monitor"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Software</div>
  </div>
  <div class="section-card">
   <div class="section-card-icon"><i data-lucide="puzzle"></i></div>
   <div class="section-label">Extensions</div>
  </div>
 </div>
</div>
